text:
3. SOVIET MOVES IN THE MIDDLE EAST CRISIS

Comment on:

A member of the Soviet delegation to
the United Nations reportedly told Arab delegates on 7 November that the Israelis have no intention of returning behind the armistice lines and that a UN police force would only shield them in their present positions. He said that if it were necessary, the USSR would be able to provide sufficient volunteers to force the Israelis back. According to a Saudi Arabian UN
